post.description: Accepts Client-ID and Client-Secret in headers to generate a JWT access token.

parameters.name: Client-Id
parameters.description: Client ID provided to the application

parameters.name: Client-Secret
parameters.description: Client Secret associated with the client ID

post.description: Accepts an refresh token and issues a new JWT token.
Async API to upload multiple file URLs for verification processing.

flow_id.description: Flow ID associated with the verification

file_urls.description: List of file objects containing S3 URLs and metadata

post.description: Creates a flow and primary applicant. A Flow must be created uniquely for combination of  `application_id` and `external_reference_id`.

get.description: API to fetch verification status of all files submitted for a given flow.

200.description: Status response for all files and the master status

master_status.description: Overall master status based on file statuses

400.description: Bad Request - Missing or invalid parameters

error.description: The client did not provide a required query parameter.
Authentication token is invalid or expired

409.description: Applicant not found with provided external_reference_id and flow_id

410.description: Applicant is deleted with provided external_reference_id and flow_id

get.description: Retrieves most recent chat messages for flow ID with paginated support. Query parameters `page` (default 1) and `per_page` (default 10) for pagination control.

parameters.name: flow_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the chat flow

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to retrieve (for pagination).

page.description: The current page number being returned

per_page.description: The number of messages included per page

total_pages.description: The total number of pages available based on the per_page limit

total_items.description: The total number of messages available for the query

has_next.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results

has_prev.description: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results

401.description: Unauthorized access due to invalid token

post.description: Send a text message to the chat service and receive response.

message.description: The text message sent by the user
Response text from the chat service
message.example: I'm doing well, thank you for asking! How can I help you today?

get.description: Fetches document types for a given product type. If no product_type is provided, returns the list of all available product types.

parameters.name: product_type
parameters.description: Product Type identifier (optional). If omitted, all available product types are returned.

200.description: Successful response with document types or list of product types

document_types.description: List of document types for the given product type
